name: Standoff: The FBI, Power and Paranoia
original_name: Standoff: The FBI, Power and Paranoia
overview: Follows the relationships between FBI directors and the presidents they serve, examining James Comey's clash with Donald Trump, J. Edgar Hoover with Richard Nixon, Bill Clinton with Louis Freeh, and George W. Bush with Robert Mueller.

trailers.title: Standoff: The FBI, Power and Paranoia | Trailer
